notifications.title: Kind Attention to the Institutions:The results of Nov./Dec. 2025 Examinations (UG/PG) (For candidates admitted in the year 2025 – First Year & Lateral Entry) have been published.Students who wish to apply for photocopy of their answer scripts should submit their request through their respective Colleges on or before 24.03.2026 (Monday), 5:00 PM.Click Here
